title: CI: parallel system tests: logs --until --follow: exited too late
body:
```
         not ok 47 |035| podman logs - --until --follow journald in 7018ms
...
         # #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
         # #|     FAIL: podman logs --until: exited too late!
         # #| expected: -lt 5
         # #|   actual:     5
         # #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```
Forking from #23479 because that's a hodgepodge. This is a specific.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
